headline: A Look At Fastenal (FAST) Valuation As New Carrollton Logistics Hub Expands Growth Ambitions
summary: Fastenal (FAST) has flagged a new chapter in its logistics buildout by starting construction on a significantly larger Southeast regional operations and logistics center in Carrollton, Georgia, geared toward higher storage capacity and faster order fulfillment. See our latest analysis for Fastenal. The share price has eased in the short term, with a 1 month share price return of 2.63% and a 7 day share price return of 1.68%. However, the 1 year total shareholder return of 20.31% and 5 year...
